rationale: If marker misses cluster near recurring recovery windows, test simple calendar-aware turnaround hypotheses as T0/T1 diagnostics only.
expected_failure_mode: fails Gold all-era economics or Future Confidence before promotion

hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
